headline: How Boeing Is Pivoting From Crisis To Efficiency
summary: The primary insight within Boeing’s (BA) recent performance is the decoupling of cash flow trajectory from top-line revenue volume. While revenue grew 14% to $22.22 billion, beating consensus, the operating cash flow improved to a deficit of $179 million from a $1.62 billion deficit in the prior year.
